scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix landing && npm install --prefix 3d-viewer && npm install --prefix json-formatter && npm install --prefix base64-encoder && npm install --prefix regex-tester
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix landing && npm run build --prefix 3d-viewer && npm run build --prefix json-formatter && npm run build --prefix base64-encoder && npm run build --prefix regex-tester && node scripts/merge-dist.js
scripts.preview: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npx netlify-cli dev --dir dist
